description: End-to-end integration test plan -- documents test procedures for SC-01 (60-second, 5-scene video renders to valid MP4), SC-03 (performance target met), SC-05 (n8n POST/poll/download works), SC-06 (no valid manifest produces render error, no invalid manifest passes validation). This is the test plan document; actual execution is OBJ-078.
notes: Tier 6 validation plan. Delivers concrete test procedures with literal CLI commands, ffprobe assertions, and pass/fail thresholds across 5 suites (Smoke, SC-01, SC-03, SC-05, SC-06). SC-05 suite gated on OBJ-057/OBJ-075. All fixtures use only verified geometries and cameras. OBJ-078 executes these procedures.
